title: PUT /books/{id} does not re-validate that title/author stay non-empty
evidence: app.py:100-107 update_book assigns book.title/book.author from data without the required-field check applied on create (app.py:53)
suggestion: Reject empty/None title or author on update the same way create does (400)

title: Tests run against the app's real books.db rather than an isolated/in-memory DB
evidence: test_app.py:6-11 imports app/db as-is (SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URI=sqlite:///books.db from app.py:11) and calls db.create_all()/drop_all() on that same file
suggestion: Point the test config at sqlite:///:memory: (or a temp file) in setUp to isolate tests from the workspace DB

title: Write handlers catch bare Exception and return generic 500
evidence: app.py:68, 112, 125 use `except Exception as e` with `e` unused and a generic error message
suggestion: Narrow to SQLAlchemyError or log the exception so failures are diagnosable

title: Adds created_at/updated_at timestamps and a demo.py driver beyond spec
evidence: app.py:24-25 timestamp columns; demo.py exercises the API end-to-end
suggestion: None — enhancement beyond the task requirements
